title: Downgrade .papr to highest atomic version
body:
Per @jlebon, the highest level of fedora atomic is 29, not 30.
Bumping the version down one in hopes of fixing our test
issues.

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body: We need to drop atomic testing and move to Fedora CoreOS or just regular fedora.

:pushpin: Commit f82b1ef has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan f82b1ef9cf7a6fd84274cd69238ce2130b714462 -->
I'd like to get rid of papr entirely, just dropped this down to get things moving in the short term.
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
